_doc: Permanent Amazon-NIS content rules. Applies across ALL brands and styles. Edits here change behavior everywhere. Title <=120 (Vendor Central apparel hard limit). Bullets <=256 each. Description <=2000. Backend keywords <=249 bytes. Front-load top keywords; first 80 chars of title are mobile-visible.

rules: Brand name MUST appear at position 0 (clean_brand_name applied).
Gender word: 'Women's' if department=womens, 'Men's' if mens, 'Boys'/'Girls' for youth (derived from age_range).
Item type name (e.g. 'Coat', 'Leggings') MUST appear once. Never duplicate.
Front-load top 3-5 keywords in first 80 chars (mobile preview).
NEVER include the style number as text. NEVER include #N/A.
NEVER repeat brand. NEVER use ALL CAPS for the whole title.
If a feature is in style_name, do not also append it as tail.
Truncate at last word boundary if exceeding 120 chars; strip trailing comma/dash.

slot_intent.purpose: Fabric story + tactile benefit. If 100% Polyester soft-hand, say so. If UPF, lead with UPF here for swim.
Fit type + key construction details (closure, neck, sleeve, pockets, length).
How and where it's worn. Versatility, occasion, layering.
Care instructions + longevity. Easy-care messaging. No raw percentages here.
Size range + complete-the-look call to action. Reinforces brand.

rules: If pre_upload_bullets has content, USE THEM VERBATIM in matching slots; AI fills only empty slots.
Each bullet starts with a 2-5 word ALL-CAPS headline followed by ' — ' then the benefit sentence.
Lead with benefit, not a feature. Buyers read for value.
No raw fabric percentages in bullets 2-5; reserve those for bullet 1 or description.
Weave 2-4 keywords per bullet naturally (no keyword stuffing).
No #N/A. No placeholder text. No 'Lorem'. No mention of style number.
Opener: 2-3 brand-voice sentences. Not a feature dump.
Use line breaks (\n) between blocks for plain-text PDP fallback.
Mention brand 2-3 times across the description.
Care + 'shape holds wash after wash' style longevity claim in final block.
No commas. Lowercase. Space-separated.
Never repeat words already in title or bullets.
Include 2-3 common misspellings (e.g. 'legins', 'leggins').
Include 1-2 Spanish search terms when category has them (mallas, pantalones, vestido).
Include synonyms (compression for tummy control, opaque for squat-proof, jacket for coat).
Include occasion + activity keywords (yoga pilates barre crossfit weightlifting / weddings cocktail brunch).
